rules.instruction: Do not run project tests, test runners, or test-like commands.
examples_forbidden: direct execution of files under tests/
rules.required_reporting: When tests would normally be run, state that tests were intentionally not run because test execution is reserved for the human project owner.

rules.instruction: Read CODING_PRACTICES.md before shaping Python edits.
rules.style_summary: Prefer vertical, list-like function signatures when signatures grow beyond a few simple arguments.

rules.instruction: Do not reintroduce clamps, bounds, scaling knobs, or recurrent-update behavior changes from prior reverted stability ideas unless the owner explicitly asks for that direction.
Prefer small, inspectable patches. Avoid broad cleanup or renaming unless specifically requested.
rules.reason: The repository contains exploratory modules and duplicated or legacy playground files.

rules.instruction: Do not edit generated artifacts or local run outputs except intentional repository placeholder files.
Identify whether the canonical file is at repository root, under sensors/, or under node_roles/ before editing.
rules.reason: Several similarly named modules are used for different prototype layers.

final_response_requirements.instruction: If tests would normally be appropriate, clearly report that testing is reserved for the human project owner.
